back_translation: After these events, I heard a loud voice, like the voice of a great multitude in heaven, saying, ‘Hallelujah! Salvation, glory, and power belong to our God

Because His judgments are true and righteous. Because He has judged the prominent prostitute, the one who corrupted the earth with her sexual-immorality, and He has avenged the blood of His servants from her hand
And a second time they said, ‘Hallelujah! And the smoke of her rises forever and ever’
And the twenty-four elders and the four living-creatures fell down and worshiped God, the One seated on the throne, saying, ‘Amen, Hallelujah’
And a voice came out from the throne, saying, ‘Praise our God, all you His servants, and you who fear Him, both small and great’

And I heard a voice like the voice of a great multitude, like the voice of many waters, and like the voice of mighty thunder, saying, ‘Hallelujah! Because the Lord God, the One who possesses supreme authority, has begun to reign as king
Let us rejoice and be glad, and give honor to Him, because the wedding of the Lamb has come, and the bride of His has prepared herself
And she was given to be clothed in fine linen, splendid and pure (because that fine linen is the righteous deeds of the saints)
And the angel said to me, ‘Write: those who are called to come to the wedding feast of the Lamb are blessed’ And the angel said to me, ‘These are the true words of God’

And I fell down at the feet of him, in order to worship him. But he said to me, ‘Do not do that. I am a fellow-servant with you, and a fellow-servant with your brothers, those who possess the testimony of Jesus. Worship God. Because the testimony of Jesus is the Spirit of prophecy’
And I saw heaven opened, and behold, one white horse, and the One who was seated on it bore the name ‘Faithful and True’. And He judges and wages war with righteousness
His eyes were like flames of fire, and on His head were many crowns. He had a name inscribed which no one knew except Himself
And He was wearing a robe soaked with blood. And He bore the name ‘The Word of God’
And the armies in heaven followed Him on white horses, dressed in fine linen, white and pure

And from His mouth came a sharp sword, in order to use that sword to strike down all the nations. And He will rule them with an iron scepter. And He treads the winepress of the wine of the furious wrath of God, the One who possesses supreme authority
And on His robe and on His thigh, He has a name inscribed: ‘King over all kings, and Lord over all lords’
And I saw one angel standing in the sun, and he cried out with a loud voice, saying to all the birds flying in mid-air, ‘Come, gather to participate in the great supper of God

So that you may eat the flesh of kings, the flesh of commanders of one-thousand, the flesh of mighty ones, the flesh of horses, and the flesh of those who ride those horses, and the flesh of all people, both the free and the enslaved, both small and great’
And I saw the wild-beast, the kings of the earth, and their armies, gathered together to wage war against the One seated on the horse, and against His army

But the wild-beast was captured, and with it, the false-prophet, the one who had performed signs in the presence of the wild-beast, by which signs he deceived the people who had received the mark of the wild-beast, and the people who worshiped the image of it. Both of them were thrown alive into the lake of fire that burns with sulfur
And the rest were killed by the sword of the One seated on the horse, the sword that came out from His mouth. And all the birds gorged themselves from their flesh
